risk_note.tr: Microsoft Support 'What to do if Microsoft Edge isn't working' belgesindeki resmi yollardir. Repair veriye dokunmaz; Reset mevcut Edge profilini siler. Microsoft sayfasinda 'Reset' yerine 'Repair' on planda. Chrome/Firefox kendi resmi belgeleri varsa onlara bakin (bunlar Microsoft kaynagi degildir).
risk_note.en: Official paths from Microsoft Support 'What to do if Microsoft Edge isn't working'. Repair preserves data; Reset removes the current Edge profile. The Microsoft page highlights Repair over Reset. Chrome/Firefox have their own vendor docs - this guide is Microsoft-sourced only.

body.tr: edge://settings/help adresine git veya Settings and more (...) > Settings > About Microsoft Edge. Guncelleme varsa otomatik indirir, restart sonrasi cogu sorun cozulur.
body.en: Navigate to edge://settings/help or Settings and more (...) > Settings > About Microsoft Edge. Updates download automatically; restart often resolves issues.

body.tr: Settings and more (...) > History > Delete browsing data. Time range 'All time' secip 'Cookies and other site data' + 'Cached images and files' isaretle.
body.en: Settings and more (...) > History > Delete browsing data. Pick 'All time' for Time range, check 'Cookies and other site data' + 'Cached images and files'.

title.tr: Repair (veri korunur) - Start > Settings > Apps > Installed apps > Microsoft Edge > Modify > Repair
title.en: Repair (data preserved) - Start > Settings > Apps > Installed apps > Microsoft Edge > Modify > Repair

body.tr: Microsoft yazisindan: Reset 'gecmis, cerez ve degistirdigin ayarlari kaldirir; Repair degil'. Ayarlar > Reset settings > 'Restore settings to their default values'. Bookmark ve kayitli sifreler korunur, eklenti ve site izinleri sifirlanir.
body.en: Per Microsoft: Reset 'removes your history, cookies, and any settings you might have changed, whereas repairing the browser won't affect anything'. Settings > Reset settings > 'Restore settings to their default values'. Bookmarks/passwords preserved; extensions and site permissions reset.

body.tr: Bilgisayari yeniden baslat. Anti-malware tarama yap (Defender Quick Scan). Acik sekme ve uygulamalari kapatip yeniden dene.
body.en: Restart the PC. Run anti-malware scan (Defender Quick Scan). Close other tabs/apps and retry.
